title: Mermaid Live Editor
description: Edit Mermaid source with live rendering — flowchart, sequence, class, state, ER, gantt, pie and mindmap; export SVG and 2x PNG.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Mermaid is loaded on demand (it's a large library); source and diagrams stay in your browser.

editor.heading: Mermaid source
editor.placeholder: Type mermaid source here, e.g. flowchart LR …

preview.heading: Preview
preview.empty: Diagram renders here as you type
